_purpose: Narrow repair for one Hermes cron job: explicitly pin brain-health-monitor to the approved current inference route. The job is pinned by its provider/model fields; source semantics intentionally leave its creation snapshots null because snapshots guard only unpinned axes.

tasks.spec:
Emit the exact deterministic repair script below.
MOCK_FILE: apply_cron_pin.py
import json
import sys
from pathlib import Path

sys.path.insert(0, '/Users/hermes/.hermes/hermes-agent')
from cron.jobs import resolve_job_ref, update_job

JOB_ID = '1993d0a05a63'
NAME = 'brain-health-monitor'
PROVIDER = 'openai-codex'
MODEL = 'gpt-5.6-terra'

def main():
    before = resolve_job_ref(JOB_ID)
    if not before or before.get('id') != JOB_ID or before.get('name') != NAME:
        raise SystemExit(2)
    changed = before.get('provider') != PROVIDER or before.get('model') != MODEL
    updated = update_job(JOB_ID, {'provider': PROVIDER, 'model': MODEL})
    after = resolve_job_ref(JOB_ID)
    if not updated or not after or after.get('id') != JOB_ID or after.get('name') != NAME:
        raise SystemExit(3)
    if after.get('provider') != PROVIDER or after.get('model') != MODEL or after.get('enabled') is not True or after.get('state') != 'scheduled':
        raise SystemExit(4)
    receipt = {k: after.get(k) for k in ('provider_snapshot', 'model_snapshot', 'enabled', 'state', 'schedule_display')}
    receipt.update({'job_id': JOB_ID, 'name': NAME, 'provider': PROVIDER, 'model': MODEL, 'verification_passed': True, 'changed': changed})
    Path('cron-pin-receipt.json').write_text(json.dumps(receipt, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
MOCK_END
tasks.check: /Users/hermes/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python3 apply_cron_pin.py && /Users/hermes/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python3 -c "import json,sys; sys.path.insert(0, '/Users/hermes/.hermes/hermes-agent'); from cron.jobs import resolve_job_ref; r=json.load(open('cron-pin-receipt.json')); j=resolve_job_ref('1993d0a05a63'); expected={'job_id':'1993d0a05a63','name':'brain-health-monitor','provider':'openai-codex','model':'gpt-5.6-terra'}; receipt_ok=all(r.get(k)==v for k,v in expected.items()) and r.get('verification_passed') is True and r.get('enabled') is True and r.get('state')=='scheduled' and r.get('provider_snapshot') is None and r.get('model_snapshot') is None; live_ok=(j and j.get('id')=='1993d0a05a63' and j.get('name')=='brain-health-monitor' and j.get('provider')=='openai-codex' and j.get('model')=='gpt-5.6-terra' and j.get('enabled') is True and j.get('state')=='scheduled' and j.get('provider_snapshot') is None and j.get('model_snapshot') is None); (receipt_ok and live_ok) or sys.exit('FAIL: pin verification failed'); print('cron inference pin verified')"
